Service date
History, Examination, Treatment, Progress and Operation
Inv. Ordered

Ht. : _______ Wt. : _______ Kg BP : _______ mmHg Pulse : _______ /Min Temp. : _______ °F SpO2 : _______ %

14/2 c/s/6 Dr. Kailesh Pujary.

Adv - To clean tracheostomy tube.
Tolbechgrade scopy of stoma to look
downwards.

Dr. Kailesh Pujary
& Unit I
Dr. Kailesh Pujary
Professor & Head of Dept & Unit I
Department of ENT-Head & Neck Surgery
Kasturba Hospital, Manipal
KMC Registration No: 38454

14/02/2022
Left upper airway all normal
Downwards - granulation around stoma
- Substernal trachea - normal
no e/o granulation/ mass
Small bleeding points noted
- trachea up the carina on
upwards: Supra sternal trachea
sub glottis
? penetration, No e/o aspiration

Manipal - 576104, Udupi District, Karnataka
Phone: 0820-2571967 / Fax: 0820-2571934 / 2574321, Email: helpdesk.kh@manipal.edu
